decisions.name: Is_there_a_related_to_Opportunity
decisions.label: Is there a related to Opportunity?

Flow.description: If the event is marked as completed, incomplete or rescheduled by ISR, these are the requested fields to add to the event to then be mapped to the opportunity: Added decision path to check for future event/multiple outcomes. JC 3.15.24 DJ 6.11.24 - Added path for sales discovery call not related to an opp 12/10/2024 - MC - Added permissions check for closed opp to allow custom permissions: OpportunityValidationOverride and AllowOpportunityEdits to bypass the closed opp screen and continue to edit 02/28/2025 - BW - Removed the Closed Opportunity error pathway as Sales Reps have permissions to edit closed opportunities 06/25/2025 - AC - Manually adding Choice set on SaaS Opportunities' promo code 07/21/2025 - BW - Included EC Logic 09/03/2025 - BW - Included Meeting Cancelled and Meeting No Show to Discovery Meeting screens
Flow.label: EVENT/OPPTY: Demo Workflow

fields.name: BU_Update_Event_Instructions
fields.fieldText: Please select the disposition below to update the current Demo Event.

fields.name: BU_DisposionHelpText
fields.fieldText: If the disposition is "Incomplete" or "Rescheduled", please add a comment/notes below.

fields.name: Disco_Call_Became_Demo
fields.fieldText: Did the Discovery Call Became a Demo

fields.name: Update_Event_Instructions
fields.fieldText: Please select the disposition below to update the current Demo Event.

fields.name: Update_Opportunity_Instructions
fields.fieldText: Please review the following Opportunity fields and update/fill in as needed.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_BU_Update_Event_Instructions
fields.fieldText: Please select the disposition below to update the current Demo Event.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_BU_DisposionHelpText
fields.fieldText: If the disposition is "Incomplete", please add a comment/notes below.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The event is not related to an opportunity. Please close the screen and select a related Opportunity in the "Related To" field.

fields.name: ErrorMessageBecameDemoYes
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The event is missing an Opportunity, an opportunity is REQUIRED for all Demo Events. Please close the screen and input an Opportunity into the "Related To" field.

fields.name: Future_Task_Error_Message
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The event selected is in the future and cannot be dispositioned yet. Please close this screen and select a different event or wait for this event to be in the past before adding a disposition.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Error_Message
fields.fieldText: ERROR: You cannot select more than one outcome for an event.

fields.name: Current_Outcome_No_Show
fields.fieldText: The current outcome of this event is No Show.

fields.name: Current_Outcome_Canceled
fields.fieldText: The current outcome of this event is Canceled.
